title: vitis litoralis
intro: Vitis litoralis, also known as coastal grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vitis litoralis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Vitis litoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in ointments and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
